content: GitHub Actions macOS runners (July 2026): macos-15 is current macos-latest (migrated Aug 2025). macos-26 GA Feb 26 2026, macos-latest migrates ~Jun 15 2026. macos-14 deprecated Nov 2 2025. macOS runners consume minutes at 10x rate. Free in public repos. Private repos use included minutes at 10x multiplier (~300 actual macOS minutes from 3000 included). Depot.dev offers M4 macos-26 at $0.08/min.
